name: Wikontic (Wikidata-aligned, ontology-aware KG with entity normalization + qualifiers)

paper.title: Wikontic: Constructing Wikidata-Aligned, Ontology-Aware Knowledge Graphs with Large Language Models

difficulty.rationale: candidate-triplet extraction with qualifiers -> entity normalization to canonical Wikidata items (dedup) -> Wikidata type/relation constraint enforcement; deterministic mock, no GPU/finetuning
